  • Account Details
  • Orders
); const footerLinks = infoLinks.map(item => (
  • {item.name}
    • )); return (

    Customer Service

      {footerLinks}

    Links

      {footerLinks}

    Newsletter

    © {new Date().getFullYear()} MERN Store
    ); }; export default Footer;
